title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TALLAG BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABAGAN, PROVINCE OF 1SABELA, TO BIUAG COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 126 / 55 OG No. 19, 3439 (May 11, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2126, April 07, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TALLAG BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABAGAN, PROVINCE OF 1SABELA, TO BIUAG COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives} of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Tallag Barrio School in the Municipality of Cabagan, Province of Isabela, is hereby changed to Biuag Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 7, 1959.
